system.description:
Some warriors use unique training methods that draw on arcane forces to enhance speed and agility. Duelist Benefits. The Duelist is a partial Mage class taken by an Adventurer with another partial class. Partial Warrior/Duelist is common for a light-armor combatant with high mobility; a Partial Expert/Duelist may be an assassin, while rare Mage/Duelist combinations make wizards more talented with sword than spell. All Duelists gain Stab as a bonus skill. The Flaw of Fragility. Duelists are excellent one-on-one combatants but spend less time at physical conditioning. Partial Warriors/Partial Duelists use 1d6 hit dice instead of the usual 1d6+2; other mixes are unaffected.
